title: agropyron repens var. pungens
intro: Agropyron repens var. pungens, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. pungens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
